name: Hanger
description:
__Debut:__ Chapter 97; Episode 48
__Affiliations:__ Robecca Hanberg
__Occupations:__ Salesperson
__Residence:__ Loguetown
__Birthday:__ September 23rd

Hanger is the owner of a clothes shop in Loguetown from which Nami bought all the best clothes. His hair resembles a clothes hanger.
